_doc: Users who are good at MNIST but bad at CIFAR-10 (M3, F3) should accumulate
high MNIST TR and low CIFAR-10 TR over the session, causing the system to
select them for MNIST tasks but deprioritise them for CIFAR-10 tasks.
The reverse holds for M2/F2 (good CIFAR, bad MNIST).
Tasks run in blocks of 5: 5x MNIST, then 5x CIFAR-10, repeated for 30 total.
name: EXP4-multirep-mixed-distribution-5-task-dataset-switch-500tasks
